name: topsec-fw-5u
description: OctoBus package for TopSec FW 5U WebUI login, refresh, blacklist, and logout APIs.

TopSec_FW_5U.TopSec_FW_5U/Login.name: login
TopSec_FW_5U.TopSec_FW_5U/Login.description: Log in to the TopSec FW 5U WebUI.

TopSec_FW_5U.TopSec_FW_5U/Refresh.name: refresh
TopSec_FW_5U.TopSec_FW_5U/Refresh.description: Refresh a TopSec FW 5U WebUI session.

TopSec_FW_5U.TopSec_FW_5U/AddToBlacklist.name: add-to-blacklist
TopSec_FW_5U.TopSec_FW_5U/AddToBlacklist.description: Add one IP address to the TopSec FW 5U blacklist.

TopSec_FW_5U.TopSec_FW_5U/RemoveFromBlac.name: remove-from-blacklist
TopSec_FW_5U.TopSec_FW_5U/RemoveFromBlac.description: Remove one IP address from the TopSec FW 5U blacklist.

TopSec_FW_5U.TopSec_FW_5U/Logout.name: logout
TopSec_FW_5U.TopSec_FW_5U/Logout.description: Log out from the TopSec FW 5U WebUI.
